name: hermes-browser
description: Agentic AI browser — Hermes Browser MVP

scripts.lint: node --check main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer.js
scripts.test: node tests/agent.test.js && node tests/credentials.test.js && node tests/autofill-form.test.js && node tests/mcp-bridge.test.js && node tests/mcp-bridge-spawner.test.js && node tests/scheduler.test.js && node tests/command-palette.test.js && node tests/reading-list.test.js && node tests/workspace.test.js && node tests/session-recorder.test.js && node tests/live-bridge.test.js && node tests/cowork.test.js && node tests/cowork-perf.test.js && node tests/cowork-v2.test.js && node tests/cowork-v3.test.js && node tests/cowork-v5.test.js && node tests/cowork-v6.test.js && node tests/cowork-v7.test.js && node tests/smoke.test.js && node eval/runner.js
scripts.test:unit: node tests/agent.test.js && node tests/credentials.test.js && node tests/mcp-bridge.test.js && node tests/mcp-bridge-spawner.test.js && node tests/mcp-server.test.js
